description_long: This jet ski features a streamlined, aerodynamic hull with a gradient color scheme transitioning from green at the front to red at the rear. The body is constructed from molded plastic or fiberglass, with visible panel lines and subtle surface texturing. The front section includes a pair of handlebars with ergonomic grips and a central control console, likely housing instrumentation and controls. The seat is contoured and appears to accommodate a single rider, with a raised backrest for support. At the rear, dual exhaust outlets and a grab handle are visible, suggesting a powerful propulsion system. The overall design is compact and robust, suitable for high-speed water travel and easy maneuverability.
description: A compact, streamlined jet ski with a green-to-red gradient body, ergonomic handlebars, and a single contoured seat.
description_view_0: Rear view showing dual exhaust outlets, grab handle, and the back of the contoured seat.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full length, seat profile, and handlebar structure.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the aerodynamic nose, handlebar grips, and control console.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the seat, handlebar, and hull contours.
attribute_handlebar_design: Wide, slightly curved black handlebar with textured grips and visible control housings at each end.
attribute_seat_configuration: Single contoured seat with a raised backrest, black in color, and a smooth surface finish.
